title: senecio bellis
intro: Senecio bellis, also known as the Daisy Groundsel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is a perennial plant with yellow flowers that are commonly found in grasslands and meadows. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio bellis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption.
